LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANTS REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA, HARRIET HOPF, JOHN FEINER, JEREMY LIEBERMAN, MARK LOONEY, MICHAEL GROPPER, CHARLES YOST AND PEARL TOY'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS TENTATIVE RULING: OVERRULED, TWENTY DAYS TO ANSWER. PLAINTIFF ALLEGES THAT PRURITIS RESULTED IN 50% OF CASES (PARAGRAPHS 10 AND 16); THAT EACH DEFENDANT REPRESENTED THAT "HIGH OCCURRENCE RISKS" WERE DISCLOSED (PARAGRAPH 26); AND THAT DEFENDANTS WERE AGENTS OF THE REGENTS (PARAGRAPH 6). PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600
